channel.title: +Infection on Vishvas's notes
channel.description: Recent content in +Infection on Vishvas's notes

item.title: Apparel
item.description: Eye glasses - Wear any, but prefer full eye covering. Masks Even cloth masks help. Refer - masks4all1, masks4all2 WHO was retarded: “The WHO also recommends public mask usage during high-severity influenza pandemics – just not during this Coronavirus pandemic.”, “WHO describes a MINIMAL standard. It doesn’t mean that we couldn’t do MORE.” Errors in reasoning about masks by NN Taleb here. Suprising demo of effectiveness of masks: " the salon story where two infected stylists failed to infect all their 140 clients (making the probability of infection for bilateral mask wearing safely below 1% for a salon-style exposure) — we know the probability of infection for non mask wearers from tens of thousands of data points and the various R0 estimations) plus".

item.title: Herd immunity
item.description: India The third national sero surveillance indicates only 20% of the population is exposed to the virus. Only 1 out 15 aged 10 years and above in India were exposed to the virus by Aug 18 2020. Vaccination rate 202101: India has been vaccinating at 2.2 lakh/ day. 0.21% of the population have been vaccinated in 13 days.

item.title: Human persistence
item.description: Infectivity Available data suggest that patients with mild-to-moderate COVID-19 remain infectious no longer than 10 days after symptom onset. Most patients with more severe-to-critical illness likely remain infectious no longer than 20 days after symptom onset. There have been numerous reports of moderately or severely immunocompromised people shedding replication-competent virus beyond 20 days. CDC Immuno-compromised folks Cancer patients and those who have a compromised immune system keep shedding viruses for long.

item.title: Other resistance
item.description: Use safe anti-virals at lower doses (see treatment page). Gargling

item.title: Prophylactic prescription
item.description: Adults (50kg) Ivermectin 12 mg, 2 tablets per week for 4 weeks 1% povidone/iodine solution for gargling - 500ml Calcitriol (vitamin D) .25mcg, 1 tablet daily for 1 week Zinc 100mg daily for 1 week Kids (25 kg) Ivermectin 12 mg, 1 tablets per week for 4 weeks 1% povidone/iodine solution for gargling - 500ml

item.title: Reinfection
item.description: Uncommon cases Protection from prior infection (Mar’20 until Dec‘20): 91% There have been re-infections of the Corona virus have been described around the world. Not all reinfections seen so far are milder. About 1 in 5 or even 1 in 3 of those infected during the first wave in India had declining antibodies 6 months later. General antibody persistence Even mild Covid infection induces a robust antigen-specific, long-lived plasma cells in the bone marrow that lasts >12 months.

item.title: Risk models
item.description: Overview Adjustible simulations/ models: natgeo 202008 Successful Infection = Virus Dose x Time Alternate \(I_r = \dfrac{N t C_q (Q_b)^2 p_m^2}{\gl_a V}\) Their key result is boiled down to this equation for Risk Index \(I_r\). N is the number of people in the enclosed space, t is the time spent therein. \(C_q\) is the concentration of exhaled infection quanta (virions) per cubic meter. \(Q_b\) is the exhaled volume in cubic meters per hour.

item.title: Seasonality
item.description: Cold / indoor weather increases death rate even without Wuhan epidemic. Cold and low humidity air is good for the virus. Most experts believe: it will run a seasonal course for next 5 years despite vaccination.

item.title: Transmission mechanics
item.description: Overview “We know that at least 44% of all infections–and the majority of community-acquired transmissions–occur from people without any symptoms (asymptomatic or pre-symptomatic people).” It turns out it takes 2 days to become infectious, not 5 days. “Some experts estimate that as few as 1000 SARS-CoV2 infectious viral particles are all that will be needed.” - EB corona-growth-visualization Virus expulsion mechanics “A single breath releases 50 - 5000 droplets. Most of these droplets are low velocity and fall to the ground quickly.
